questionHtml:
The diagram shows the energy flow between five “sinks” in a terrestrial ecosystem.

In a typical terrestrial ecosystem, which trophic level would have the highest biomass?

A. Autotrophs

B. Primary consumers

C. Secondary consumers

D. Detritus feeders

meta.title: The diagram shows the energy flow between five “sinks” in a terrestrial ecosystem. In a typical terrestrial ecosystem, which trophic level would have the highest biomass? A. Autotr

C4.2.12. Reductions in energy availability at each successive stage in food chains due to large energy losses between trophic levels
